testSummary: Feedback 61 (47 unit + 14 integration/12 files), unsubscribe 11 (8 unit + 3 integration). Full monorepo 31/31 turbo tasks on TWO cold runs (cache:false, 0 cached). Integration ran on real PG localhost:5433. No Phase 2-7 regression (dispatcher 52, onboarding 38, /tests 7 still pass). Verified: hard bounce->per-workspace suppression+global_hard_bounces+profile bounced+email_events, cross-checked via dispatcher buildIsSuppressedQuery (per-workspace AND global arms); complaint->no global; soft suppresses only after N distinct ses_message_ids, replay doesn't advance; SNS replay->one row each (ON CONFLICT on new (workspace_id,ses_message_id,type) index+PKs); auto-suspend isolates offender (per-workspace rate + MIN_SENT_FOR_RATE) healthy stays active; unsubscribe scoped (A doesn't suppress B).
notes: Migration 0007 UNIQUE index email_events(workspace_id,ses_message_id,type) (IF NOT EXISTS, applied); suppressions PK (workspace_id,email) + global_hard_bounces PK (email) confirmed. Workspace resolution SENDER-SIDE ONLY (mail.tags.workspace_id->config_set->from_domain via reader); unresolved->status unresolved->SNS handler batch item failure (never guessed/default, never recipient-derived). Soft-bounce count = count(DISTINCT ses_message_id) over email_events scoped (workspace_id, recipient, type=bounce, sub_type=Transient). Feedback tx runner asserts each statement workspace-scoped $1 EXCEPT deliberate cross-workspace global_hard_bounces write. Reused dispatcher buildIsSuppressedQuery (added @cdp/service-dispatcher dep to feedback) for Phase-7 cross-check. Scope: §10 only, no broadcasts/automations/metering/frontend.
